proposal.description: URI of the proposal this intensity declaration applies to

voter.description: DID of the voter making this intensity declaration

signal.description: Signal direction, must match the base vote record

units.description: Quadratic voice credits allocated. 1=1², 4=2², 9=3², 16=4². Maps to intensity level 1-4.

creditsSpent.description: Same as units, explicit alias for clarity in audit trails

delegatedFrom.description: DIDs whose voting power was aggregated into this intensity record. Empty = direct.

delegationDepth.description: 0 = direct, 1 = one hop. Max 1 in PARA QV-LD.

effectiveWeight.description: Computed effective weight after QV sqrt and correlation discounting. Stored for audit trail.
